transit.header: We are providing additional train service to bring you into NYC for the Knick's Championship Ticker-Tape Parade.
transit.description:
Expect a much higher volume of customers traveling today for the historic celebration. Plan accordingly by building in extra travel time.

Note: Alcohol will not be permitted all day system-wide throughout our network, including on our trains, in our stations, and throughout Grand Central Terminal. The MTA PD will enforce this alcohol ban. Celebrate responsibly.
